title: CMS Testing Disrupted, Student Stress Concerns Rise
summary: Technical issues disrupt end-of-year testing in Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools, raising concerns among parents about increased student anxiety.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the impact of technical failures on student well-being and the need for reliable testing systems.

title: Flooding Closes Restaurants, Strands Cars in Union County
summary: Widespread flooding in Union County leads to restaurant closures and disruptions to local activities, including soccer matches.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the vulnerability of local businesses and infrastructure to severe weather events.

title: Shelby Officer Fired, SBI Investigates Use of Force
summary: A Shelby police officer is fired, and the NC SBI is called in to investigate an incident involving the use of force.
charlotte_impact: Underlines the importance of accountability and transparency in law enforcement practices.

title: Weekend Weather Shift: Rain to Sunshine
summary: Scattered downpours expected today, but Sunday promises sunshine and temperatures near 76 degrees before rain returns on Monday.
charlotte_impact: Provides a forecast of shifting weather patterns, impacting outdoor activities and local events.

title: Couple Wins $1.6M Judgment Against Builder Over Construction Issues
summary: A Denver couple wins a $1.6 million judgment against Nest Homes for breach of contract and fraudulent misrepresentation related to construction defects.
charlotte_impact: Exposes the risks associated with construction projects and the importance of builder accountability.

title: Shelby Officer Suspended for Punching Woman During Arrest
summary: A Shelby police officer is suspended after being accused of punching a woman during an arrest, raising concerns about police conduct.
charlotte_impact: Raises serious questions about police brutality and the need for proper training and oversight.

title: Greg Biffle's Ex-Wife Sues Over Fatal Plane Crash
summary: Nicole Biffle files a wrongful death lawsuit alleging negligence in the plane crash at Statesville Regional Airport that killed seven people.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the legal aftermath of a tragic aviation accident and the pursuit of accountability.

title: Car Break-ins Plague Clover Neighborhood Again
summary: Thieves target the Clover neighborhood for the second time, breaking into multiple vehicles and stealing at least one gun.
charlotte_impact: Addresses ongoing concerns about local crime and the need for increased security measures.

title: Salisbury Teacher Arrested on Sex Offense Charges Involving Former Student
summary: David Steelman, 51, is arrested on multiple sex offense charges involving a former student, dating back to 2012.
charlotte_impact: Exposes a serious case of alleged sexual misconduct and abuse of power within the education system.

title: Charlotte Douglas Airport Receives $46.9M for Expansion
summary: The FAA awards Charlotte Douglas International Airport $46.9 million to expand its apron, improving infrastructure and safety.
charlotte_impact: Details investment in airport infrastructure, enhancing capacity and safety for travelers.

title: Man Dies Months After Hit-and-Run in Charlotte
summary: Frank Leon Dent dies 10 months after a hit-and-run in north Charlotte; police seek information on the unknown driver.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the tragic consequences of hit-and-run incidents and the ongoing search for justice.

title: Suspect Arrested in Hit-and-Run of 8-Year-Old in Charlotte
summary: Shaiquailalia Di Ndia Lashi Harris is charged with felony hit-and-run after an 8-year-old was struck by a vehicle in south Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers to pedestrians and the legal consequences for reckless drivers.

title: Charlotte Transit System Reports Significant Drop in Crime
summary: Charlotte's transit system reports a 69% drop in crime on buses and light rail following security enhancements.
charlotte_impact: Showcases the positive impact of security initiatives on public safety in transportation.

title: Liquor Purchases Fund Community Projects in Mecklenburg County
summary: An audit reveals that Mecklenburg County liquor purchases fund community projects, including law enforcement and alcohol education.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates how alcohol sales contribute to funding essential community services.

title: 16-Year-Old Drowns in Lake Wylie
summary: A 16-year-old drowned in Lake Wylie after failing to resurface while boating on Thursday afternoon.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of water activities and the importance of water safety.
